subcodes.first_line: Glorified is He by Whose Name the ocean of utterance surgeth in the realm of possibility, and the Sun of Manifestation hath shone forth from the horizon of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی باسمه ماج بحر البیان فی الامکان و اشرق نیر الظهور من افق سماء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Manifestation of God as sun
